subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and the justice and fairness of that joy-giving one became evident. The loved ones of God must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و عدل و انصاف آن سرور واضح گردید احبای الهی باید
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @review of publications, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
